title: AWS-Solutions-Architect Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level AWS-Solutions-Architect certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
